claims.summary: A single telemetry sample cannot show whether pressure or texture is changing through time.
claims.disposition: verify rolling temporal state, prior-sample provenance, and bounded history

claims.summary: Pressure level and pressure velocity answer different questions.
claims.disposition: verify separate level, velocity, cadence, and freshness fields

claims.summary: Eigenvector drift and related temporal evidence should remain bridge-derived rather than producer truth.
claims.disposition: verify derived-evidence provenance and compatibility projection parity

claims.summary: Changing buffering windows, cadence, or live response from temporal evidence alters transport or control behavior.
